arabic_text:
لا اله الا الله
ل ال ہ ال ال ل ہ
alt_text: Numerological diagram of the kalima 'la ilaha illa Allah'. Header shows the four constituent words with abjad letter-values (66, 32, 36, 31) summing to 99 inside a flower-shaped marker. Below, an exploding red star labelled '165' splits into the values 5, 60, 1, mapping to the 12 letters ل ل ہ ا (read individually). Connects 99 (sum of the four words) and 165 (letter-by-letter sum).
notes: Numerological breakdown of the shahada — 4 words = 99 (the famous '99 names'), 12 letters = 165 (which equals 11 × 15 or relates to the Imams).
